LanguageData.TITAN_GeneticCollapse.label: Gene Collapse
LanguageData.TITAN_VoidAnchor.label: Phase Anchor
LanguageData.TITAN_ResonanceMood.stages.0.label: Titan Resonance
LanguageData.TITAN_ResonanceMood.stages.0.description: Prototype #0's psychic waves fill me with profound peace.
LanguageData.TITAN_TitanReinforcementBuff.label: Titan Protection
LanguageData.TITAN_TitanReinforcementBuff.description: A Titan beast's power has temporarily infused this body — life and attack greatly enhanced.
LanguageData.TITAN_RoyalMark.label: Royal Mark
LanguageData.TITAN_RoyalMark.description: A vassal branded by Prototype #0's royal bloodline. All stats enhanced.
